name: x402-subgraph
description: Standardized subgraph for the x402 payment protocol — multi-chain

scripts.build:base: npm run prepare:base && graph codegen && graph build
scripts.build:mainnet: npm run prepare:mainnet && graph codegen && graph build
scripts.build:polygon: npm run prepare:polygon && graph codegen && graph build
scripts.build:arbitrum: npm run prepare:arbitrum && graph codegen && graph build
scripts.build:optimism: npm run prepare:optimism && graph codegen && graph build
scripts.deploy:base: npm run build:base && graph deploy --studio x402-base
scripts.deploy:mainnet: npm run build:mainnet && graph deploy --studio x402-mainnet
scripts.deploy:polygon: npm run build:polygon && graph deploy --studio x402-polygon
scripts.deploy:arbitrum: npm run build:arbitrum && graph deploy --studio x402-arbitrum
scripts.deploy:optimism: npm run build:optimism && graph deploy --studio x402-optimism
